review_title: Powerful
description: It feels like a product with so much potential. It's already powerful, and I expect it will only improve.
author: Darryl D.
pros: A powerful suite of tools with some unique features that make it stand out
cons: There's a little bit of a learning curve. I'm still learning how to use all the features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Jack Of All, Master Of None
description: The tool has improved since it started. But, it still needs a lot of work. Especially the AI Writing assistant which still gives out of context inputs. The UI needs to be improved and unnecessary things like 'Love Letter' can be removed. Nobody, uses it.
author: Rohit J.
pros: Combining Keyword Research and AI enabled Writing together was a good idea. In this way, users could write a complete blog in a single app without switching. I loved this combination that NeuralText offered.
cons: The UI of NeuralText still needs improvement even after the update. The AI writing assistant does not give good outputs when compared to similar softwares. I have to edit a lot of things before I could use a draft from NeuralText.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Ok but Could be better!
description: Nueral Text is good and has a lot of potential to be way better in futre
author: Godwin C.
pros: I tried out neural text and it is good and was able to assist in generating some text, however, i feel they could be better in training the AI model to provide more accurate text.
cons: The Pricing $49 is higher compared to copy ai or rytr. Also the AI engine was not able to generate the kind of text I needed for my use case.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: KW Research + Content Briefs Creation
description: KW Research and KW Clusters mainly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The dashboard is quite simple to navigate when compared to the other tools. The left hand side has the the main categories displayed ie KW Research, KW Clusters and Content Briefs.
cons: The KW Cluster report has a few glitches, it doesn't account the used clusters at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A content creation and research tool
description: This Content Creation and SEO Tool can now make content management with SEO work smarter and not harder thanks to its ease-of-use. Despite having some impressive features, it appears that their development of this tool has come to an end. However, I think it would be really great if they continue to improve their processes in particular in the proper word generating process. Now, their content generation tool is a complete waste of time.
author: Abdul K.
pros: You can use it to do market research, which helps you know what you should actually write about so that your website will rank. There are several templates and outlining you can use in order to write a article. Moreover, it can also assist you in writing faster by using artificial intelligence.
cons: In the past, there was a good quality of content being generated by their tool, but now it isn't so good. I think it will take some time for it to become an industry leader for content creation as it is a relatively new piece of software. I'm hoping that the companies behind it have a business model that allows them to continue to develop the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ultimate solution to streamline SEO and Copywriting production
description: Amazing! It has a smooth and efficient process. The features are efficient and promising!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The big pro of the tool is that helps you to streamline my workflow to create relative SEO content and to generate copywriting ideas to enhance my content. It's promising and powerful.
cons: There UI can be more intuitive and not only progressive. However, it is efficient so the other is just personal taste.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Streamlined tool for content creation
description: NeuralText is a user friendly platform with robust capability around content research and analysis, content creation and content optimisation. It has great capability to combine AI writing with keyword research and search engine research page analysis.
author: Nishant T.
pros: - AI writing assistant for content creation enabling clients with research, craft and analyse the content - Wide ranges of pre-build templates for content like emails, blogs, social media etc. - Helps content writers in finding out keyword suggestion and enables drafting research strategy around it. - The tool combines keyword search, content optimisation, content research analysis and AI writing in the single platform - Allows multiple users to collaborate on the given project - Robust integration capability with Google doc and WordPress - User friendly UI for marketers and content creators
cons: - Price slightly on higher side - Limited customisations and features - Keyword suggestion sometime lacks depth
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A great SEO assistant and Productivity tool
description: AI is a great way to build and improve the quality of your content, but it can take a lot of time. In order to automate your content process, you need AI-powered research and insights that can do the workload for you. This tool uses the exact same process to boost your productivity and generate great content for you, saving you time and money. From keyword to the blog post, this tool helped me with everything. It analyzes your search results and tells you which words are making Google rank your competitor's sites higher. It also looks at the topics and questions that are being asked about the pages on your site and your competitors'.
author: Faheem R.
pros: It's important to keep up to date with the latest technology and software. This tool seems to be an all-in-one app where you can work on your content workflow with a team and using the latest AI technology. I love Google Docs. I use it for everything, from writing this blog post to keeping track of all of my social media accounts. It's one of the most useful productivity tools that I have ever used. And the best thing about NeuralText is that it has integration for Google Docs. Apart from that, it can do almost everything a writer would need. I'll be using it along with Frase and MarketMuse, let's see which one works for me.
cons: The user interface of this product needs improvement. It's a bit clunky, and the layout is a bit confusing. It's hard to know what's going on at first. So, you need to understand it what is going on. The website went down many times because it was not sufficiently tested for large number of users. I hope this is not usual drawback of this app. The copywriting tools are getting better. The new tools allow for more efficient and efficient process of writing great content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: NeuralText has made my life as a content marketer easier
description: I started using NeuralText mainly because I needed a tool to help me search for good keywords to add to my website. I used it with another tool to get Keyword difficulty and relevance. After I had decided on a specific longtail keyword I would use neural text to help me see the competitive landscape online. Before, I would do it manually, meaning I would search on Google and other places to see what people were talking about, how other articles were approaching the subject, and what I could do to both complement and go beyond what they offered. With the reporting tool that NeuralText offers — one of the SEO reports and content briefings —I could do that all in one place in less than 20 minutes. I even get outlines of articles others have written so I don't need to visit each page individually. I can focus on those that seem to be more promising and well ranked. Because I work alone it helped me produce a lot of articles very quickly and help my website rank better. I really like what I get with NeuralText.
author: Eliaquim S.
pros: I like mainly the keyword reports that I get and the detailed SEO briefings it produces for me. I save hours of work with their reports, and it has helped me both scale the project I already have and start a new one.
cons: After the update the interface didn't seem very intuitive to me. It took me a while to get used to it. But now that I know where everything is, it's fine.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Solid correlation, SEO app with a lot of potential.
description: I am confident that Neuraltext is one of the most promising and successful writing and SEO tools for today. It is the most cost-effective, has the fastest learning time, and provides quality content for a variety of projects. I would highly recommend it to anyone who needs help with any type of writing task or company SEO projects.
author: Jean Bertin C.
pros: I use a variety of SEO tools to research keywords, optimize my content, and check backlinks. I find these tools helpful for organizing my time, but I prefer doing a lot of research on my own and then finding things to improve later. I especially enjoy using Authoritas, HikeSeo, and Rankwatch as well as Ubbersuggest. Since I've been working with NeuralText, I've seen how the company develops new technologies and has gotten a great deal of value out of it. So I'm excited to have the chance to work with them again. This is a great way to make sure your content is as high-quality as it can be. Neuraltext is a new startup that has a cutting-edge system. I love being able to get in on the ground floor and seeing how this technology will develop over time while benefiting from their improvements. I think you should support this one too if you haven't already. There are many SEO startups right now, but there are also some great ones that may have slipped by. While this one may not be right for everyone, it has a lot of potentials to reach success and is very affordable too. I have been looking to build SEO keyword-optimized content for my site with a tool that can identify the best words to include at different places in a text block.. It's fantastic that the new Neural Text tool has this which I think makes it unique. I can't wait to see how it continues to develop over time.
cons: The interface and UX could be designed to be more intuitive. It would also be a good feature to include a difficulty ranking tool for keywords as well as a redesign for the keyword clusters report. Currently, the long-form content assistant is missing a few features which would make it more competitive as a writing tool for content creators.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: NeuralText: L'alleato perfetto per il tuo marketing e la scrittura di contenuti
description: La mia esperienza con NeuralText è stata estremamente positiva. Il software mi ha permesso di velocizzare il processo di ricerca e generazione di contenuti per il mio blog e le mie campagne pubblicitarie, permettendomi di focalizzarmi su altri aspetti cruciali del mio business. Grazie a NeuralText, sono riuscito a migliorare la mia presenza online e ad aumentare l'engagement del mio pubblico.
author: Fernando G.
pros: NeuralText è uno strumento eccezionale per agevolare il processo di ricerca e generazione di contenuti per blog e campagne pubblicitarie. La sua capacità di estrarre informazioni dai motori di ricerca in modo semplice ed efficiente risulta estremamente utile per le agenzie di SEO, marketing digitale, pubblicità e copywriting, così come per freelancer e piccoli imprenditori. Il software permette di ottimizzare il tempo impiegato nella creazione di contenuti di qualità, favorendo un migliore posizionamento sui motori di ricerca e, di conseguenza, una maggiore visibilità online.
cons: Nonostante i numerosi vantaggi offerti da NeuralText, è importante considerare che la generazione di contenuti basata sull'intelligenza artificiale potrebbe non essere perfetta in ogni situazione. In alcuni casi, potrebbe essere necessario rivedere e correggere manualmente i testi generati per garantire che siano completamente coerenti e rispondano alle specifiche esigenze del target di riferimento.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool for clustering keywords and content optimization
description: I am using it on day to day basis for keyword clustering. I use it to find out which kw to target on which page.
author: Syeed Z.
pros: I like the Keyword clustering feature of NeuralText. It helps me to target topics rather than keywords. In addition, NeuralText saves me a lot of time planning my content strategy.
cons: I think its content optimization tool has space to improve. SurferSEO and Page Optimizer Pro are far superior in this aspect.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: NeuralText - a valuable part of my goto tools.
description: NeuralText can speed up your research process.
author: Glen S.
pros: I like the way that NeuralText can almost write my content structure for me. I know where to start my research using the invaluable headings/sub-headings.
cons: Slightly clunky to navigate, but it’s a product with continuous development at its core.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: All round copy writer
description: Very useful tool for marketeers
author: Rasoel A.
pros: Has many great futures. You have to invest some time in this software to get the most out of it.
cons: There are not many tutorials to get you up and running with this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Interesting tool for getting that extra content boost
description: I am pleased with Neuraltext and how it assists with content creation - also in non-english languages.
author: Esben R.
pros: I like how the tool makes content writing a breeze by being a small one stop shop for creation of ideas and output.
cons: The interface is not the most logical, so if you can overlook this, then you have a fine tool here.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simply brilliant software
description: Simply brilliant
author: Simon H.
pros: The ease of use, speed and stability is so much better than other similar programs such as Frase and Market Muse. This software is robust and works so well I am delighted to have found it-it is a pleasure to use. Also, an impressive team-they switched server architecture during a busy time and the result was flawless. The software is so fast and I love the layout, which I find much more logical than some other programs.
cons: This is early days but for blog post writers Reddit Questions and links to the relevant subreddit would be great
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great AI for freelancers and agency.
author: Binny A.
pros: The ease of use and content management is good.
cons: Needed one click blog feature for easy use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I like this software a lot.
author: Hafizi T.
pros: Writing is a difficult process, and writers can find themselves stuck in a creative block, or sometimes just a writer's block. By using this software, it can be easier to write words and sentences that are compelling and engaging to readers. The free trial is a great way to see if this is the right software for the individual. Regardless of the skill level of the writer, it is a great tool.
cons: Customer service could be better. But for a startup its just ok.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Content Creation Workflow All-In-One
description: Very responsive support and help.
author: Daniel R.
pros: It's all-in-one approach to content creation - Keyword/topic research, content briefs, AI content writing is a huge time saver. Workflow automation
cons: Still a little rough around the edges and needs to grow into itself, but the bones and foundation are there to make this an immediate purchase if you do any sort of content creation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Topic Ideas + Conetnt Briefs + Keywords Research
description: It's good to have decent Design and UI, however output quality matters the most. I found huge gaps in some outputs. Tool is not mature enough for content production at the moment, but I believe it will improve somewhere down the line. I like the keyword clusters features, and mainly I am using it for researching topics along with their associated keywords.
author: Chirag P.
pros: Ease of use; design and navigation are quite easy to follow.
cons: The output quality is not that good. AI is not much capable at the moment. Support is quite lethargic; my account stopped working, and it took more than 3 days to restore it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good product, still learning how to best put it to use for my needs
author: Stuart C.
pros: I use the ideation portions mostly. Helps me get started writing.
cons: I'm not sure, everything has worked pretty well for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: No more mind blocks!
description: The product works fine, it was offline for few days, but it was part of a migration to a better server, since then i have not had any other problems
author: Alex L.
pros: What I really like about NeuralText is that it helps you to save a lot of time on keyword research and competitors. Also, it helps you create outlines to write your articles in seconds
cons: There is a little learning curve, there are some videos but with no voice, i wish there are some step by step tutorial s
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: New ideas for content
description: Ich benutze die Software nur gelegentlich, da Schreiben für meine Website nicht meine Hauptbeschäftigung ist.
author: Bernhard H.
pros: Wenn einem nichts einfällt, hilft diese Software sehr, ansprechende Sätze zu formulieren.
cons: Ohne Bearbeitung ist fast nichts brauchbar, aber das ist vielleicht auch nicht der Sinn dieser Software.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: All in one Tool
description: I like the software and use it to write my blogs.
author: Anand P.
pros: It has all the necessary tools to do long-form writing and SEO. Value for the money.
cons: the limitation on the words can be increased
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Has great potential
description: We were looking for an AI content generation tool, and Neuraltext came recommended by someone else who had used it. Overall, I think it hasn't served what we expected its purpose to be. It is more of an idea generator than anything else, and we are unable to use it to generate social media copy or any properly useable copy. That said, it has been very useful in keyword research (which is not what we were expecting).
author: Cheryl S.
pros: The recent UI upgrade has made it very easy to navigate, and the keyword tool is very useful. I especially love the keyword cluster tool. Neuraltext also has so many different tools and content templates. This makes ideation and content generation super easy.
cons: The AI honestly isn't the best. While the content tools seem useful, the content it generates isn't actually useable and is better used as sounding boards. The copy generated tends to be rudimentary and at times, nonsensical. Perhaps it is just the nature of the industry I work in, but in my opinion, Neuraltext isn't the best for B2B content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
